description: You are a precision agriculture consultant analyzing crop health using ESA SNAP Desktop. Open the Landsat multispectral GeoTIFF at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif (band_1: SWIR1, band_2: NIR, band_3: Red, band_4: Green). Compute three different vegetation or moisture spectral indices and one classification band using conditional logic. All four new bands must be virtual bands with their expressions saved in the product metadata. Save the enriched product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/crop_health_assessment.dim and export it as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/crop_health_assessment.tif.
